pre_open.note: Random closure in the last minute

NSE_EQUITY_DERIVATIVES.note: Uses the standard NSE daytime F&O window unless superseded by exchange circulars.

NSE_CURRENCY_DERIVATIVES.note: Configured as a daytime session; verify against the latest exchange circulars.

NSE_COMMODITY_DERIVATIVES.late_close_note: Internationally referenced contracts may extend to 23:55 during non-US daylight savings periods.

NSE_INTEREST_RATE_DERIVATIVES.note: Aligned to underlying NDS-OM timing changes if notified by the exchange.

special_session.note: Order cancellation session prior to market open.

MCX.late_close_note: Evening close can extend to 23:55 for internationally linked contracts.
MCX.agri_note: Internationally linked agricultural commodities trade 17:00-21:00 in the evening session.
